hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.kt) cd backend && ./gradlew ktlintFormat -PktlintFile="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --quiet 2>/dev/null; true ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) cd frontend && npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --log-level silent 2>/dev/null; true ;; esac
